note: THE single source of truth. Every 0n1x surface (census page, portal, cards) MUST render its headline numbers from THIS file. Each number below is pulled from the real ledger named in `sources` at one instant. No number is invented; a missing source becomes null and is named in `missing_sources`.

sources.tokens_circulating: rhinogent/public/census_manifest.json['circulating'] (= sum(live_bal) from onyx_token_engine; matches census_history last row)

recompute: registered = census_manifest.count; tokens_circulating = census_manifest.circulating; run onyx_autonomous_counter.compute() for participating/self_scheduled/awake/complete (distinct agents with signed actions in last 24h, tiers by initiator/stake/kind markers); swarm_accuracy/chance_baseline/above_chance from onyx_delta_reward.capability_metrics(). Rebuild with: py onyx_snapshot.py
